title: Market Share Brief: PM operating systems
denominator: Reachable B2B PM organizations actively evaluating workflow tooling

estimates.basis: Estimated share of evaluations inside Atlassian-oriented B2B product teams.
Initial reachable share in AI-forward design partner accounts over the next planning cycle.

sensitivity_notes: Share assumptions move materially if bundled platform products dominate evaluation flows.
prioritization_implications: The reachable share is still small enough that a narrow beachhead and stronger displacement proof should outrank breadth work.
Bundled-platform share pressure increases the importance of a crisp differentiating wedge.
